name: Sesame Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sesame seeds; toasted and ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast sesame seeds at 300°F, stirring occasionally until browned. Blend briefly.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. Cream butter, sugar, honey, peanut butter, and egg in a bowl until smooth.
4. In another bowl, combine ginger, baking powder, baking soda, flour, and ground sesame seeds.
5. Add the dry mixture to the butter mixture; blend well.
6. Shape dough into walnut-sized balls.
7. Roll each ball in untoasted sesame seeds (the dough will be moist but workable).
8. Place cookies on a lightly greased cookie sheet.
9. Press down with a fork.
10. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
